title: Clinical Laboratory Technician
description: At Moderna, support our biotech research and development efforts as a Clinical Laboratory Technician, performing complex analyses in a cutting-edge facility.
responsibilities: Perform advanced laboratory tests and analyses on clinical and research samples
Maintain and calibrate sophisticated laboratory equipment
Prepare reagents and solutions following standard protocols
Document results and maintain comprehensive quality assurance records
Collaborate with researchers and scientists on projects
Ensure compliance with regulatory and safety standards

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
